dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have a substernal chest pressure that began about an hour ago. It radiates to my left jaw and arm, and I am experiencing diaphoresis and mild dyspnea.
Understood. To help me get a better sense of your condition, could you tell me if you have any known allergies to medications, foods, or environmental factors?
I have no known drug allergies.
Thank you for clarifying. Are you currently taking any prescription medications, over-the-counter drugs, or herbal supplements?
I take 40mg of atorvastatin nightly and 81mg of aspirin daily. I also take a multivitamin.
[DDX] (Myocardial Infarction; Unstable Angina; Aortic Dissection; Pulmonary Embolism; Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease)
